title: Unsafe Deserialization of Untrusted Data
description: Deserialization of data from an untrusted source using an unsafe mechanism. Unsafe deserialization can lead to remote code execution or privilege escalation.

finding.message: Unsafe deserialization sink '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Prefer safe alternatives: yaml.safe_load(), JSON with a typed schema, or Protocol Buffers.
Never deserialize data from user-controlled sources without integrity verification.
If deserialization is unavoidable, validate a cryptographic signature on the payload before decoding.
